name: Eddy Covariance Data from Katharinentalerhof Pforzheim
description: Dataset containing eddy covariance (EC) measurements recorded at the Katharinentalerhof site in Pforzheim, Germany. The resource includes metadata such as file format, size, and direct URL, along with geospatial coordinates (Latitude 48.92, Longitude 8.7) identifying the measurement location. The dataset is associated with the publication by Böhm et al. (2020).
